name: terminal-app
description: A cross-platform terminal manager with sidebar navigation
author: robothannu@gmail.com

scripts.copy-static: cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html && cp src/renderer/styles.css dist/renderer/styles.css && cp src/renderer/dashboard.html dist/renderer/dashboard.html && cp src/renderer/commonjs-shim.js dist/renderer/commonjs-shim.js && mkdir -p dist/renderer/vendor && cp src/renderer/vendor/marked.umd.js dist/renderer/vendor/marked.umd.js && cp src/renderer/vendor/purify.min.js dist/renderer/vendor/purify.min.js
